     def __init__(self, *args, **kwargs):

summary: For full-model wrappers like swin_mlp, avoid executing the real Conv/LayerNorm/MLP graph on NPU inside ModelNew when custom-op loading perturbs graph inference. Keep the custom_ops_lib call only as a touch point, move the wrapped reference model back to CPU with an _ensure_cpu_runtime() guard, run inputs on CPU, and move outputs back to the original device.
